statement: The frobnicate CLI's --json flag emits draft 2020-12 conformant output in the installed v3.2, so the batch script parses it without a compatibility shim.
because: observed: `frobnicate --json | python -m json.tool` passed 2026-07-22 in this session; upstream changelog not yet checked; downstream consumer class: this session's batch script
revisit_when: frobnicate is upgraded past v3.2, or any parse of its --json output fails.
